title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
snippet: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

title: UK borrowing costs jump as uncertainty over PM's future continues
snippet: The possibility of a change of leadership in the UK has unsettled some investors and sent bond yields higher.

title: How are countries responding to hantavirus?
snippet: The UK, US and EU are asking all citizens returning home from the virus-hit MV Hondius to self-isolate for about six weeks.

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
snippet: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
snippet: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.

title: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
snippet: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.

title: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
snippet: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.

title: Lebanon says two paramedics among 13 killed in Israeli strikes
snippet: Lebanon's health ministry says the paramedics were carrying out a rescue mission in Nabatieh in response to an earlier attack that killed one person.

title: Is this actually what Anne Boleyn looked like?
snippet: An algorithm has suggested images of what were thought to be Anne Boleyn might not be.

title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
snippet: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

title: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
snippet: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.

title: eBay rejects $55.5bn offer from GameStop
snippet: The online auction giant said it doubted how the video game retailer would finance its offer.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
snippet: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
snippet: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.
